PROP-01b-partial-inv-015.text: auctionCallback forceApprove after _multiCall must set exact amountOut approval for auction only.

locations.note: forceApprove(msg.sender, amountOut) at line 111 sets allowance to exact amountOut for s_auction (msg.sender, validated at line 103). The approval is set AFTER _multiCall completes, so arbitrary calls in the solution can potentially manipulate the token state before approval
The spender in forceApprove is msg.sender (== s_auction after the guard check at line 103)
